findings.evidence: `nl -ba ...NormalSubgroupFiberQuotient.lean` shows `rw [← hφ]` at line 97 followed by bare `change` at line 98; the regular wrapper is definitionally `@subgroupFiberOrbitQuotientEquivQuotientGroup ...` in `SubgroupFiberOrbitQuotientGroup.lean:122-127`, so this is undocumented defeq manipulation.
findings.fix: Replace the `change` step with an explicit rewrite/specialization through the non-regular equivalence, or add a short comment documenting the necessary definitional unfolding of the regular wrapper before the rewrite chain.
findings.issue: `normalizerQuotientEquivQuotientOfNormal_regularSubgroupFiberOrbitQuotientEquiv` uses `change` without a comment explaining why the regular wrapper goal cannot be reached by rewriting/`simpa`.

summary: One proof relies on an undocumented `change`, which this rubric requires either to be justified locally or avoided.
